channel.title: Smartknower on Classroom
channel.description: Recent content in Smartknower on Classroom

item.title: SmartKnowner: SEP Batch
item.description: SmartKnower September batch cybersecurity internship covering OS basics, InfoSec fundamentals, and risk management training.

item.title: SmartKnowner: AUG Batch
item.description: SmartKnower August batch cybersecurity internship classroom with VM setup, Kali Linux labs, and hands-on learning resources.

item.title: SmartKnowner: JULY Batch
item.description: SmartKnower July batch cybersecurity internship classroom with VM installation, Kali Linux setup, and networking labs.
